3286780.name: Park Manager Simulator
3286780.description:
Park Manager Simulator

Park Manager Simulator is more than just running an ordinary park—it’s about maintaining the delicate balance between nature and people in a fun and engaging management simulation.

Your mission is to build the park’s ecosystem, keep visitors happy, manage revenue streams, and turn the park into a sustainable business. But this journey won’t be easy: nature follows its own rules, visitor expectations are ever-changing, and tasks from higher management will constantly challenge you.

🎮 Game Features

  • Build a Living Ecosystem
    Manage grass, trees, animals, and the entire environment as one. Keep the park organized and protect nature.

  • Create a Profitable Business
    Collect rent from shops, balance your budget, and invest in new upgrades to expand the park.

  • Face Natural Threats
    Deal with insects, spiders, and other creatures that may harm visitors or the park. Make the right choices to protect both nature and people.

  • Visitor Happiness
    Meet the expectations of park guests, enhance entertainment and safety, and make your park an attractive destination.

  • Upgrade Your Home
    As the park’s manager, live right in the heart of the park. Renovate, decorate, and personalize your house to create the perfect living and planning space.

  • Tasks and Responsibilities
    Complete assignments from the park’s headquarters, submit reports, and meet the demands of higher management.

  • Statistics and Strategy
    Track income, expenses, visitor numbers, and satisfaction levels. Use data to plan long-term strategies and ensure the park thrives.
3286780.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 土耳其语, 意大利语, 德语, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 日语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 乌克兰语, 希腊语
